Hero.sub: We combine deep cloud native expertise with hands-on engineering to help enterprises build platforms that are secure, observable, and ready to scale.

Services.label: (1.0) Services
Services.desc: We work alongside your engineering teams on the hardest infrastructure challenges — from architecture through production.
Services.s1_d: Internal developer platforms on Kubernetes — secure, observable, and built for speed.
Services.s3_d: Full-stack monitoring, distributed tracing, and alerting with OpenTelemetry and Prometheus.
Services.s4_d: From on-prem to cloud native. Every phase planned, executed, and validated — zero guesswork.
Services.s5_d: Workload identity, policy enforcement, and compliance frameworks baked into the platform.
Services.s6_d: Hands-on workshops so your team owns the platform long-term. Knowledge transfer, not dependency.

Approach.label: (2.0) Approach
Approach.desc: We embed with your team to understand your constraints, your stack, and your goals. Every engagement produces working infrastructure.
Approach.step1_d: Deep-dive into your architecture, operational practices, and business requirements.
Approach.step2_d: Design a target state that balances reliability, security, and operational simplicity.
Approach.step3_d: Build alongside your engineers. IaC, GitOps pipelines, validated deployments — version-controlled.
Approach.step4_d: Production readiness reviews, runbooks, and monitoring. We stay until your team is confident.

TechStack.label: (3.0) Expertise
TechStack.title: Deep roots in the cloud native ecosystem.
TechStack.subtitle: Production experience across the CNCF landscape and major cloud platforms.

Contact.label: (4.0) Contact
Contact.desc: Whether you're planning a migration, improving observability, or building a platform from scratch.

CookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics.

About.label: Cloud native consulting · Seoul
About.sub: We believe enterprises deserve infrastructure they can trust — secure, observable, and built to last. Todea was founded in Seoul to bring deep cloud-native engineering to the Asia-Pacific region.
About.story_p1: Todea started with a simple observation: too many cloud-native transformations are led by people who have never operated production Kubernetes. We took a different approach — building a consultancy grounded in hands-on engineering, not slide decks.
About.story_p2: Our team brings experience delivering enterprise platforms at scale — across financial services, consulting, and cloud-native transformations. We bring that same rigor to every engagement, whether it is a two-week assessment or a full platform build.

AboutCredentials.label: (2.0) Speaking
AboutCredentials.desc: We share what we learn. From KubeCon to regional Kubernetes Community Days, we bring engineering experience to the cloud native community.
